identification_marking.description: Ring numbers, schemes, metal rings, other marks, and verification systems for unique bird identification throughout its life

species.description: Species codes, taxonomy systems, and identification verification by both finders and ringing schemes

demographics.description: Age and sex classification systems based on plumage characteristics and morphological features

temporal.description: Date and time formats for recording capture, observation, and handling events

spatial.description: Geographic coordinates, location accuracy, and spatial encoding systems for recording bird locations

biometrics.description: Physical measurements including wing length, weight, bill dimensions, tarsus, fat scores, muscle condition, and moult status

methodology.description: Capture methods, handling conditions, manipulation status, lures used, and procedural information
